title: rubus rabenaui
intro: Rubus rabenaui, also known as the Tahina or Tahitian black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rubus rabenaui include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus rabenaui include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams and preserves, showcasing its versatility in herbal preparations.
